utir:
task_id: "proof-hello"
description: "Proof: write a file, summarize, open PR"
operations:
  - type: "shell"
    command: "mkdir -p /root/repo/proofs && echo $(date -u) > /root/repo/proofs/HELLO_ENGINE.txt"
    timeout: "5s"
  - type: "assert.shell_success"
    command: "test -s /root/repo/proofs/HELLO_ENGINE.txt"
    timeout: "5s"
  - type: "shell"
    command: "python3 - <<'PY'\nfrom datetime import datetime\nfrom pathlib import Path\nroot = Path('/root/repo/proofs')\nroot.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)\nsummary = root / 'HELLO_ENGINE_SUMMARY.txt'\nsummary.write_text(f'Proof summary generated at {datetime.utcnow().isoformat()}Z\\n', encoding='utf-8')\nprint(summary.read_text())\nPY"
    timeout: "10s"
  - type: "http.get"
    url: "https://example-disallowed-host.invalid/"
    timeout: "5s"
    max_response_size: "1KB"
